name: Starry Night, Starry Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>夜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>や</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>煌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>めく<ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: The Dragon Twinkling in the Holy Night
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned from the hand: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. Cannot be destroyed by battle with a DARK monster, or by a DARK monster's effects. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks an opponent's monster: You can banish that opponent's monster until the End Phase, also this card can make a second attack in a row.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned from the hand: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. Cannot be destroyed by battle with a DARK monster, or by a DARK monster's effects. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks an opponent's monster: You can banish that opponent's monster until the End Phase, also this card can make a second attack in a row.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned from the hand: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. Cannot be destroyed by battle with a DARK monster, or by a DARK monster's effects. Once per turn, at the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks an opponent's monster: You can banish that opponent's monster until the End Phase, also this card can make a second attack in a row.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
